# AskSaul.ai

AskSaul.ai builds practical AI assistants, AI voice agents, websites, web applications, and marketing automation for small and mid-sized businesses. The company is led by Gregory Ringler in Denver, Colorado.

## Core services

- AI & Automation: self-hosted assistants, workflow automation, CRM intelligence, chat assistants, and business-specific AI tooling.
- AI Voice Agents: phone agents that answer missed or after-hours calls, qualify callers, capture job context, and route lead details into GHL, CRM, email, SMS, or a human follow-up workflow.
- Websites & Apps: conversion-focused websites and custom web applications.
- Saul Marketing: CRM, email/SMS sequences, funnels, pipelines, reputation management, and marketing automation.

## Voice-agent demo

AskSaul's live provider-facing voice-agent demo is available at (970) 401-7285. The demo shows how Saul can answer a local service inquiry, ask intake questions, and capture context for follow-up.

## Important limitations

AskSaul avoids unsupported claims. Voice agents do not replace a strong team or emergency decision-making process. Direct booking, emergency escalation, and CRM behavior depend on the client's phone routing, scheduling tools, CRM access, and configured business rules.

- AI Voice Agents: https://asksaul.ai/voice-agents
- AI & Automation: https://asksaul.ai/ai-automation

- Saul Marketing: https://asksaul.ai/marketing-engine

- Contact: https://asksaul.ai/contact
